title: Molt
overview: Consumed by an internet conspiracy about a sinister, unseen entity, a journalist grows increasingly convinced the threat is real. As his investigation deepens, he loses his grip on reality and spirals into paranoia. Ignoring his roommate’s warnings, he turns to a fringe parapsychologist who feeds his obsession. He doesn’t know if he’s closing in on the ominous presence—or if it’s hunting him.
